summary.lv: Citadele Leasing aicina pievienoties Biznesa sistēmu analītiķi/-i, kurš/-a palīdzēs attīstīt un ieviest biznesa projektus, sadarbojoties ar IT un biznesa komandām.
summary.en: Citadele Leasing is looking for a Business Systems Analyst to help develop and implement business projects, bridging IT and business stakeholders.
